title: murraya intermedia
intro: Murraya intermedia, also known as orange Jessamine, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Murraya intermedia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in digestion. Murraya intermedia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
